mapper.select: SELECT f.SENDER_NO, f.RECEIVER_NO, f.STATUS, m.MEM_NO, m.MEM_NAME, m.ONLINE_STATUS FROM FRIENDS f JOIN MEMBER m ON m.MEM_NO = CASE WHEN f.SENDER_NO = #{memNo} THEN f.RECEIVER_NO WHEN f.RECEIVER_NO = #{memNo} THEN f.SENDER_NO END WHERE f.STATUS = 'Y' AND (f.SENDER_NO = #{memNo} OR f.RECEIVER_NO = #{memNo}) ORDER BY m.STATUS ASC, m.MEM_NAME ASC

SELECT m.MEM_NO, m.MEM_NAME, f.STATUS
FROM MEMBER m LEFT JOIN FRIENDS f ON ( (f.SENDER_NO = #{senderNo} AND f.RECEIVER_NO = m.MEM_NO) OR (f.SENDER_NO = m.MEM_NO AND f.RECEIVER_NO = #{senderNo}) ) WHERE m.MEM_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' AND m.MEM_NO != #{senderNo} ORDER BY m.MEM_NAME ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FRIENDS (SENDER_NO, RECEIVER_NO, STATUS) VALUES (#{senderNo}, #{receiverNo}, 'N')
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FRIENDS WHERE (SENDER_NO = #{senderNo} AND RECEIVER_NO = #{receiverNo}) OR (SENDER_NO = #{receiverNo} AND RECEIVER_NO = #{senderNo})

SELECT f.SENDER_NO, f.RECEIVER_NO, f.STATUS, m.MEM_NO, m.MEM_NAME FROM FRIENDS f JOIN MEMBER m ON m.MEM_NO = f.SENDER_NO WHERE f.RECEIVER_NO = #{receiverNo} AND f.STATUS = 'N' ORDER BY f.SENDER_NO DESC
